summary: Make the real-time feedback capsule draggable and let it collapse into a persistent status dot at either screen edge.
scope: Split the click-through full-screen skeleton and interactive feedback capsule into separate non-activating panels.
Snap and collapse the capsule at the left or right screen edge; click or drag inward to expand it.
Persist free position, dock side, vertical position, and collapsed state across launches.
Keep the default capsule position 120 points above the screen bottom so it stays above the Dock.
validation: Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
Runtime window inspection confirmed separate 2560x1440 click-through and 390x52 feedback panels
notes: The feedback panel is non-activating and does not replace the browser as the gesture target.
macos-v0.4.1 remains the rollback point immediately before this UI change.
